from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import *

'''
source_container = "retail-data"
source_folders = "customers"
target_container = "bronze"
target_folders = "customers"
'''

print (f"Data processing started for: {source_folders}")

df = spark.read.format("csv")\
        .option("header","true")\
        .option("inferSchema","true")\
        .load(f"abfss://{source_container}@ecomdevstorage1.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_folders}/*")
    
print(f"Read completed for {source_folders} in {source_container} container. Now adding tow metadata columns to {source_folders}.")

df = df\
        .withColumn("file_path", input_file_name())\
        .withColumn("last_updated_ts", current_timestamp())
    
print(f"Metadata columns added successfully. Now writing {target_folders} to {target_container} container.")

df.write\
    .format("delta")\
    .mode("overwrite")\
    .save(f"abfss://{target_container}@ecomdevstorage1.dfs.core.windows.net/{target_folders}/")
    
print(f"Write completed for {target_folders} in {target_container} container.")

print(f"Data processing completed successfully all {target_folders} in {target_container}")
